name: Auth Split Layout
description: 50/50 split layout for authentication pages with branded background.

backgroundImage.description: Background image URL for the right panel

overlayOpacity.description: Opacity of the dark overlay on the background image

default.description: Form content for the left panel

decision_rule: Use for login, registration, and password reset pages. Right side hidden on mobile (< lg breakpoint).

filament_equivalent.note: Filament has built-in auth pages — use this for custom auth layouts
